name: nat-vent-fan-preserved-on-thermostat-event
description: Natural ventilation fan stays active when thermostat emits state_changed with hvac_mode=off (Issue #95)

verdict.summary: Verifies the stale-clear guard: fan_active must NOT be cleared when natural_vent_active=True, even when thermostat reports hvac_mode=off
verdict.observed_behavior: fan_active preserved during nat vent despite thermostat state_changed event
verdict.expected_behavior: fan_active preserved during nat vent despite thermostat state_changed event

events.note: Outdoor 61F well below threshold (75+3=78F) — nat vent conditions met
Door opens — triggers handle_sensor_opened(), which enters nat vent and activates fan
Ecobee emits state_changed after fan_mode=on was set (hvac_mode stays off). Pre-fix: this cleared fan_active. Post-fix: nat_vent_active guard prevents the clear.

assertions.reason: sensor opened; outdoor 61F <= comfort_cool 75F + delta 3F = 78F threshold — nat vent mode
thermostat_state_changed with hvac_mode=off while natural_vent_active=True — stale-clear guard must prevent fan_active from being cleared
